name: Klipfolio Dashboard API
what_it_does: Klipfolio REST API for dashboard and KPI reporting platform. Enables AI agents to create and update dashboards, push metric data, manage data sources (klips), query PowerMetrics data, and automate KPI reporting workflows. Klipfolio is used by agencies and SMBs for real-time business intelligence dashboards.
use_cases: Pushing live metric data to dashboards from business operations agents
Creating and updating KPI dashboards from reporting automation agents
Managing data source connections from BI infrastructure agents
Querying PowerMetrics data for automated reporting agents
not_for: Complex SQL-based data exploration without visualization needs
best_when: A small-to-medium business or agency wants AI agents to push data and manage KPI dashboards programmatically, especially for client reporting or operational metrics.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Dashboards may expose sensitive business metrics. Data pushed via API is stored on Klipfolio servers — verify data residency for compliance.

auth.notes: Klipfolio uses API key in Basic auth header (key as username, empty password). Keys are account-scoped. No OAuth flow — simple key-based authentication.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: limited dashboards and data sources; PowerMetrics has separate pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Teams and Agency plans with more dashboards, users, and data refresh frequency
pricing.notes: Canadian company with competitive SMB pricing. PowerMetrics (advanced) is a separate product with different pricing.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits per account; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — REST API with Basic auth (API key as username)
No webhooks — pull-based integration model only
Data push to dashboards requires understanding Klip data source format
PowerMetrics and classic dashboards have different APIs
Rate limits not clearly documented — test carefully
Canadian data residency — verify for EU compliance requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: API key in Basic auth header. SOC2, GDPR. Canadian company — CA/US data residency. Business metrics data — confidential.

security_score_components.security_notes: API key as Basic auth. SOC2, GDPR. Canadian company. Business KPI data is confidential.
